summary: Testing BLOCK B - Historical Offer Intelligence. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Fixed character encoding bug in NORMALIZATION_MAP. Frontend: All features working - page loads, overview cards, analytics table, import dialog, tabs navigation. One pre-existing data quality issue identified (corrupted encoding in historical DB records).

issues: One category shows 'Мокр�� процеси' with corrupted Cyrillic - this is pre-existing corrupted data in MongoDB from before encoding fix, not a code bug
Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility improvement needed

action_items: Consider adding DB cleanup script to fix corrupted historical records (Мокр�� → Мокри) if data accuracy is critical
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Encoding bug in /app/backend/app/routes/historical_offers.py line 23 - 'Мокр�� процеси' corrected to 'Мокри процеси', and line 28 '��лоч' corrected to 'плоч'
GET /api/historical/analytics - Returns categories with median/avg/min/max prices, batches list, unique types and cities
POST /api/historical/import-preview - Parses XLSX, normalizes SMR descriptions, skips section headers, normalizes units
POST /api/historical/import-confirm - Saves historical rows with batch metadata (project, date, city), requires Admin role
AI proposal internal_price_hint - Correctly returns historical price data when available for recognized categories
Normalization maps: мазилк→Мокри процеси/Мазилка, плоч→Облицовка, шпакл→Шпакловка, etc. all working
Section keywords (рекапитулация, subtotal, общо за) correctly skipped during import preview
Sidebar navigation link 'Ценова база' at /historical-offers present and working
seed_data_creation: Test imports created during backend tests (TEST_Project_Confirm), pre-seeded data: 10 rows in 2 batches (Хотел Бояна 2020 + Офис Люлин 2022, both София)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical offers feature (BLOCK B) fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/historical/analytics (with city/activity_type filters), POST /api/historical/import-preview (XLSX parse), POST /api/historical/import-confirm (save). AI proposal at POST /api/extra-works/ai-proposal includes internal_price_hint field. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_historical_offers.py. One DB data quality issue: some old records have corrupted Cyrillic encoding 'Мокр��' - need manual DB cleanup if desired.

POST /api/historical/import-preview pars.notes: Correctly parses XLSX, maps keywords to categories (мазилк→Мокри процеси/Мазилка etc), skips section headers (рекапитулация, subtotal)

POST /api/historical/import-confirm save.notes: Creates batch record with project name, date, city, row count. Requires Admin/Owner role

GET /api/historical/analytics returns ca.notes: Returns complete analytics with median_material, median_labor, median_total, min_total, max_total, sample_count

AI proposal includes internal_price_hint.notes: Returns available=true with median prices and range_label when historical data exists for category

Normalization maps keywords like мазилк→.notes: All 5 tested keyword mappings correct (мазилк, боядисв, плоч, шпакл, гипсокарт)

Section headers (subtotal, рекапитулация.notes: 3 section headers correctly skipped in test, only 3 real work rows imported

Frontend: /historical-offers page shows.notes: Cards show: Исторически редове (16), Импорт пакети (5), Категории (7), Градове (2)

Frontend: Comparative table shows catego.notes: Table headers: Категория, Подтип, Ед., Случаи, Мед. материал, Мед. труд, Мед. общо, Мин., Макс.

Frontend: Import dialog with file upload.notes: Dialog opens, file upload input present, metadata fields appear after file upload

Frontend: Sidebar has 'Ценова база' navi.notes: Link at /historical-offers visible in sidebar and navigates correctly

bug_fix_applied.description: Fixed character encoding corruption in NORMALIZATION_MAP - line 23 had 'Мокр�� процеси' (corrupted и), line 28 had '��лоч' (corrupted п)
bug_fix_applied.impact: New imports now correctly normalize to 'Мокри процеси' and 'плоч' keywords

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - All endpoints use real backend with MongoDB
